hypothesis: If a multi-stage AI-guided pipeline combining database mining, machine learning interatomic potential relaxation, and conditional generative modeling is applied to Li–Si–X chemical space, then it will identify and design novel silicon-based anode materials with theoretical capacities exceeding 1500 mAh/g and structurally stable Li⁺ migration channels, because integrating geometric channel analysis with graph neural network relaxation and CVAE-based generation enables systematic exploration of hypothetical structures beyond those accessible through conventional computational screening alone.
